base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of flagpole_stem — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Static pole column — 8-wide tile repeats vertically. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static pole column — 8-wide tile repeats vertically; topped by flag_wave sprite at world-end
